mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_BACKUP_MONTH_ITEM_RECORD (MR_ID, MR_YEAR, MR_MONTH, MR_BOOK_ID, MR_TEMPLATE_ITEM_ID, MR_ITEM_VALUE, MR_CREATE_BY, MR_CREATE_TIME, MR_UPDATE_BY, MR_UPDATE_TIME, MR_IS_DELETED) SELECT MR_ID, MR_YEAR, MR_MONTH, MR_BOOK_ID, MR_TEMPLATE_ITEM_ID, MR_ITEM_VALUE, MR_CREATE_BY, MR_CREATE_TIME, MR_UPDATE_BY, MR_UPDATE_TIME, MR_IS_DELETED FROM FIN_MONTH_ITEM_RECORD WHERE MR_BOOK_ID = #{bookId} AND MR_IS_DELETED = 0
